channel.title: Video tutorials on how to create a web application with ReactJS and WordPress using Frontity [In Spanish]
channel.description:
[Fran Gallardo](https://twitter.com/fran__gallardo) from the [Product Designer](https://productdesigner.es/) created a series of **video tutorials in Spanish** on how to create a web application with ReactJS and WordPress using Frontity.
Check them out here:
Part 1- [https://youtu.be/hHWsignnoYQ](https://youtu.be/hHWsignnoYQ)
Part 2 - [https://youtu.be/wKDdLVA6yO4](https://youtu.be/wKDdLVA6yO4)
Part 3 - [https://youtu.be/Aik3QuyGd_g](https://youtu.be/Aik3QuyGd_g)
Thank you for these awesome videos! 🙌

item.title: Video tutorials on how to create a web application with ReactJS and WordPress using Frontity [In Spanish]
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Fran also published a written version of his video tutorials

Product Designer Academy

Cómo crear una web app con WordPress y React usando Frontity - Product...

Mini serie donde crearemos una web app basada en WordPress y ReactJS gracias al framework Frontity.

Read full topic
item.source: Video tutorials on how to create a web application with ReactJS and WordPress using Frontity [In Spanish]

item.title: Video tutorials on how to create a web application with ReactJS and WordPress using Frontity [In Spanish]
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Fran Gallardo from the Product Designer created a series of video tutorials in Spanish on how to create a web application with ReactJS and WordPress using Frontity.

Check them out here:
